description: Qualify chemical companies for Poka Labs sales outreach. Identifies specialty chemical sellers and categorizes them.

waterfall_filter.description: Cheap pre-qualification filter to disqualify companies that clearly don't fit before running full qualification.

questions.prompt: Does this company SELL chemical/technical products (has product catalog, product pages, products listed)? Or do they ONLY provide services/software/logistics/equipment/testing/contract manufacturing?
Is this company B2B/wholesale/industrial (sells to businesses)? Or retail/DTC consumer-focused only?

waterfall_filter.closing_instruction: Be decisive. If clearly a service company or retail brand, say NO.

categories.name: CHEMICAL
categories.description: Adhesives, coatings, resins, solvents, surfactants, polymers, catalysts, additives, paints, inks, pigments, lubricants, greases, industrial fluids, food ingredients, flavor chemicals, agrochemicals, fertilizers

categories.name: PHARMA
categories.description: Pharma intermediates, API precursors, lab chemicals, reagents, diagnostic materials, life science supplies, research chemicals, biotech materials

categories.name: ENGINEERED_MATERIALS
categories.description: Graphite, carbon materials, engineered plastics, thermoplastics, composites, technical ceramics, abrasives, advanced materials, specialty alloys

categories.name: OTHER_TECHNICAL
categories.description: B2B technical/specialty products not in above categories: water treatment chemicals, electronic chemicals, construction chemicals, oilfield chemicals, mining chemicals, textile chemicals, personal care ingredients, nutraceutical ingredients, veterinary ingredients, cleaning/sanitation chemicals, industrial gases, converted products

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED_COMMODITY
categories.description: Sells only bulk/commodity chemicals with public price indexes (methanol, ethanol, benzene, toluene, xylene, sulfuric acid, sodium hydroxide, ammonia, acetone, HDPE, LDPE, PP, PET, PVC, propane, butane)

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED_NOT_PRODUCT_SELLER
categories.description: Does not sell chemical products: services-only, consulting, logistics, equipment/machinery, software, testing labs, certifications, marketplaces

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED_RETAIL_ONLY
categories.description: Consumer brands with no B2B/wholesale arm

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED_BROKER_ONLY
categories.description: Import/export traders or brokers with no manufacturing or inventory

categories.name: INSUFFICIENT_INFO
categories.description: Cannot determine classification from available content

company_name.description: Official company name as displayed on website

products_found.description: 3-5 specific product names or categories found

questions.question: Does this company actually SELL chemical products they own, manufacture, or stock inventory of? (Not just services, consulting, logistics, equipment, or brokerage)
Is this company primarily B2B (business-to-business) rather than retail/direct-to-consumer?
What type of chemical products does this company primarily sell?
questions.guidance: COMMODITY = bulk chemicals with public price indexes (methanol, benzene, HDPE, etc.), sold in bulk with minimal customization. SPECIALTY = formulated/customized chemicals with value-added services, custom formulations, branded products, technical documentation. MIXED = significant offerings in both categories.

questions.question: What specialty chemical signals are present? (Check all that apply: custom formulation services, multiple product grades/variants, technical documentation TDS/SDS, branded products with trademarks, application-specific solutions, R&D partnerships, detailed case studies)
Does this company have manufacturing capability OR stock inventory? (vs pure broker/trading agent)
Do their products require technical specifications, SDS/TDS, or product knowledge to quote?
Which pages were most useful for this classification?
Were there any signals that contradicted your final classification?

classification_logic.description: Apply these rules in order to determine final category

rules.result: Assign most appropriate category: PHARMA (if pharma/life science focus) > ENGINEERED_MATERIALS (if materials focus) > CHEMICAL (if general chemical focus) > OTHER_TECHNICAL (if technical but none of above)

classification_logic.category_priority_note: When company spans multiple categories, use primary revenue/focus. For conglomerates, only qualify if the page content is about a relevant division.

sufficiency_check.prompt_addition: Before answering, assess if the provided content contains enough information to confidently classify this company. If key information is missing (e.g., no products page found, unclear business model), indicate what additional pages would help: 'products page', 'about page', 'services page'.
